mapper.sql: id, uuid, apply_uuid, `order`, leader_uuid, reject, status, is_delete, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT a.uuid AS approve_uuid, a.apply_uuid, a.`order`, a.status AS approve_status, CASE a.status WHEN 0 THEN '删除' WHEN 1 THEN '通过' WHEN 3 THEN '驳回' WHEN 4 THEN '待审批' WHEN 5 THEN '审批中' WHEN 9 THEN '审批通过' END AS approve_status_name, a.reject, a.create_time, ap.type, ap.length_type, ap.start_time, ap.end_time, ap.length, ap.reason, ap.apply_user_uuid, su.name AS apply_user_name, su.work_num AS apply_user_work_num FROM approve a JOIN apply ap ON a.apply_uuid = ap.uuid LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON ap.apply_user_uuid = su.uuid WHERE a.leader_uuid = #{leaderUuid} AND a.is_delete = 1 ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
